hypothesis: Add item_id × store_id smoothed target encoding (mean sales per item-store pair using training data only with smoothing factor 50). This was the best performing target encoding in exp_0014 (WRMSSE=0.97640) and exp_0016 (WRMSSE=0.97966). Now combining it with the day-of-week seasonal lag features from exp_0012 (WRMSSE=0.94640, best overall). Testing whether item×store encoding on top of the best feature set improves further. All other settings unchanged from exp_0012.
